commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `models status` to account for CLI runtime auth providers, report canonical `google/*` routes through `google-gemini-cli`, and add regression coverage for `GEMINI_API_KEY` plus a Gemini CLI OAuth profile.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +94. Total +149 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main documents canonical `google/*` plus `google-gemini-cli` runtime, while `models status` only reports canonical provider auth and Codex runtime routes. I did not run a live Gemini OAuth command with real credentials.
commands.review_followup: The PR has a protected `maintainer` label and needs contributor-supplied real CLI proof plus maintainer acceptance of the stricter auth-check semantics; no automated repair is appropriate from this review.

target.title: fix(cli): show Gemini CLI runtime auth status
target.body:
## Summary
- include CLI runtime auth providers in `models status` runtime-auth accounting
- report canonical `google/*` routes using `google-gemini-cli` as runtime auth routes
- add regression coverage for `GEMINI_API_KEY` plus Gemini CLI OAuth profile

Fixes #79585

## Test plan
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: giodl73-repo
